summary: Read-only post-patch RAG audit of contextPackBudget/root intent routing. Found that applyContextPackIntentBudget underfills context packs and suppresses cross-root evidence; eval:context passes but current golden set does not measure cross-root recall or pack fill rate.
decisions: Treat current audit as read-only; no code edits were made.
Recommend changing contextPackBudget from a hard root filter to a root-aware interleaving/diversity budget with minimum secondary fill and pack fill-rate checks.
Recommend expanding eval golden set with cross-root cases and assertions for returned count and required evidence mix.
next_steps: Patch applyContextPackIntentBudget so it fills the requested limit and guarantees reserved secondary evidence when available.
Add eval cases where answer quality requires Wiki + Sources + accepted Instances or Projects + Sources together.
Add metrics for fill_rate, root_mix, and budget_dropped_high_ranked_paths to eval output.
